0.q: K599-CED9 hairy roots did not show significant differences in H2O2 content between control and stress treatments, whereas K599-empty hairy roots showed increased H2O2 under inoculated 50 mM NaCl and 150 mM NaCl treatments.

1.q: PVX/CED-9 plants are capable of preventing stress-induced K+ efflux from mesophyll cells, so maintaining intracellular K+ homeostasis.
K599-empty hairy roots showed a dramatic decrease in potassium levels under 150 mM NaCl treatment, whereas in K599-CED9 hairy roots this decrease was much less pronounced.
